rawOutput.rationale: Documentation-only change; one non-required extended check is unavailable but required checks and review completeness are satisfied.

waivers.reason: Extended coverage job is outside the docs-only acceptance scope.

expectedNormalizedArtifacts.purpose: Record pass, waived, report-only, or block decision without hiding the waiver.
Attach waiver metadata to the affected claim and keep it distinct from tested or proved evidence.
Expose the human disposition and command evidence in the change evidence package.
